---
name: Task Issue
about: A change to files in the repository
title: ""
labels: task
assignees: ""
---
<!--
## Branch Rules

Create a branch linked to this Issue per the common rules in
[.github/policies/commit-and-branch.md](/.github/policies/commit-and-branch.md),
and perform all related work on that branch.
Each branch must be linked to exactly one Issue. Do not work on two or more
Issues on the same branch.

## Issue Scope

Any change to files in the repository may be made through a Task Issue.

## Labels

In addition to the base `task` label, you may use:

| Label | Description |
|---|---|
| bug | Something isn't working |
| documentation | Improvements or additions to documentation |
| enhancement | New feature or request |
| chore | Maintenance tasks, tooling, CI, configs, or dependency updates |

## Language

Write the Issue title and body in English.
-->

## Background
<!--
Why is this change needed? What problem does it solve?
-->

## Target
<!-- Affected areas. e.g. `.github/`, scripts, CI -->
- Target 1

## Changes
<!-- What will be done. e.g. "Add a Post type to the Issue template" -->
- [ ] Task 1
- [ ] Task 2

## Notes
<!--
Optional. Information that doesn't fit in the sections above.
Examples:
- A mermaid timeline summarizing deadlines
- Long-form research notes for a technical decision
-->
